meta.title: The Global Magnitsky Act: Ending Impunity for Human Rights Abusers
meta.description: To address the current impetus for expanding the Magnitsky Act, Hudson Institute welcomes Bill Browder, author of Red Notice: A True Story of High Finance, Murder, and One Man’s Fight for Justice, Kyle Parker, Senior Professional Staff Member, House Committee on Foreign Affairs, and Congressman Jim McGovern (D-MA-2) - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
